text.title: Refactoring Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes detected smell to canonical transform. Leaves reference rules from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are tests green AND cover the affected paths?

conclusion.verdict: STOP. Add characterisation tests first (separate commit). Then return to this tree.

branch.question: What smell did the lint / coverage / review surface?

conclusion.verdict: Extract Method on logical chunks; name by intent; one commit per extraction

branch.question: Are there ≥3 branches mapping cleanly to types?

conclusion.verdict: Replace Conditional with Polymorphism — introduce strategy/visitor
Decompose Conditional — extract guard expression + branch bodies into named methods
Introduce Parameter Object — bundle related args into a dataclass / Pydantic model
Replace Magic Number with Symbolic Constant — module-level constant + reference
Use IDE/language-server rename; never sed; verify dynamic string-key references
Escalate to [[code-decomposition-patterns]] — refactoring-patterns cap is 5 files

text.example: smell=long-method, tests_covered=true → Extract Method (rule one-transform-per-commit). Three sequential commits as in 05-examples.xml. Each commit ≤1 file, tests green before/after, scope-guard pre-commit hook satisfied.
